availabilityZones.description: Availability zone names used by created or BYO subnets.

cidrBlock.description: VPC CIDR block when the VPC is created by this stack.

eipAllocationId.description: Elastic IP allocation ID backing the NAT gateway.

internetGatewayId.description: Internet gateway ID when created by this stack.

isByoVpc.description: True when the VPC is owned outside this stack.

natGatewayId.description: NAT gateway ID when created by this stack.

securityGroupId.description: Security group ID for private workloads.

vpcId.description: VPC ID. Absent when default-VPC mode defers lookup to AWS at runtime.
